heading.description: Check bullet heading accepted by the current smart_layout generation path.

description.description: Specific explanatory sentence for the check bullet.
description.example: This point identifies a helpful practice learners should remember and apply.

icon_name.description: Optional Remix Icon class accepted by the current smart_layout item mapping.

items.heading: What Works
items.description: This point identifies a helpful practice learners should remember and apply.

items.heading: Why It Helps
items.description: This point connects the practice to a concrete learning outcome.

validation_rules: Block type must be exactly smart_layout.
Items must use fields accepted by the current smart_layout item mapping.
Each primary item description must be 12-15 words.
